chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-499 of 2026 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on CMA No.2076/2026 2. For order on CMA No.2077/2026 3. For order on CMA No.2078/2026 4. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026. Mr. Haider Waheed, Advocate for the Petitioner --------------- 1. Granted. 2-4. After advancing certain preliminary submissions, learned counsel submits that he does not press this Petition as the Petitioner would avail his remedy in pending Income Tax Reference Application No.01/2022 by seeking recall of the interim Order of suspension. The Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
